comment.text: This is a noun referring to the "Trash" section where deleted files are stored. It appears as a label in various UI components, often as part of a longer sentence or as a section name.

usage.context: {{ name: selection[0]?.title }}. {" "} {!isThirdParty ? isFolder ? t("FolderPermanentlyDeleted", { trashSection: t("Common:TrashSection"), }) : t("FilePermanentlyDeleted", { trashSection: t("Common:TrashSection"), }) : t("DeleteItemsSharedNote")}{" "}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: "Lixo" means "garbage/rubbish" (the physical waste material), not the trash bin/recycle bin section. In Portuguese, the UI section for deleted files is called "Lixeira" (trash can/bin), not "Lixo".
